backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages two in-memory maps: announcements (keyed by title) and roster members (keyed by name), exposing CRUD query/update methods for both.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the animated fire-style 'JOIN NOW' button requirement for HeroSection.tsx, referencing affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON blob containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a build-planning reference for all components, hooks, pages, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet that defines OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, applying border and background/foreground defaults globally.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags, manifest link, favicon, service worker registration, and the React root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme color, display mode, and categories for installability.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background-refresh strategy for GET requests, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements via add/edit/delete forms backed by React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and formatted timestamp (converted from ICP nanoseconds) with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the brand logo, a description, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the 'Legend X Esports' title, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to the roster and about sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the brand logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' external link button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of AnnouncementCards fetched via the useAnnouncements hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a team player showing their avatar image, name, and role badge with hover animations and a fallback default avatar.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Displays the team roster section with loading, error, and empty states, fetching roster data via the useRoster hook and rendering PlayerCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme, and adding utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by assembling HeroSection, AboutSection, RosterSection, NewsSection, and Footer components in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports-specific color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording an existing feature (animated yellow/red CTA button in HeroSection) and a pending action request to remove text and add that unique animated button.
